column2: Using the Lectura app allowed me to get lecture notes significantly faster than I could have done manually
column3: The generated flashcards and quizzes accurately reflect the key concepts from the uploaded video/text without factual errors.
column4: The application interface is intuitive, and it did not take long to figure out how to generate study materials.
column5: The structured format (Cornell Notes + integrated chatbot) helps me understand complex material better compared to simply watching a video
column6: The application was fast and stable: the generation of notes and tests occurred without crashes or critical errors, even when processing long videos.
column7: I would be happy to use the Lectura platform on a regular basis to prepare for my actual exams and sessions.
column8: What did you like most about the application, and what, in your opinion, is missing?
flashcard are very good for exam preparation
quizess, flashcards, summaries, chatbot all in one is comfortable
